title: DNA extraction from tunicates
author: Marta Wawrzyniak
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b33sqqne

steps.title: Add 500 µL of Ph-Ch-IA solution...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of Ph-Ch-IA solution and 350 µL of SDS-Lysis buffer.

steps.title: Mix by vortexing at maximum speed for 00:00:45
steps.instruction: Mix by vortexing at maximum speed for 00:00:45 .

steps.title: Cool for 00:01:00 on ice
steps.instruction: Cool for 00:01:00 on ice.

steps.title: Mix again by vortexing at maximum speed for 00:00:45
steps.instruction: Mix again by vortexing at maximum speed for 00:00:45 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at Room temperature at maximum speed for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at Room temperature at maximum speed for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Heat the tubes at 70 °C...
steps.instruction: Heat the tubes at 70 °C for 00:10:00 , mix regularly by inversion.

steps.title: Mix again by vortexing at maximum speed for 00:00:45
steps.instruction: Mix again by vortexing at maximum speed for 00:00:45 .

steps.title: Cool for 00:01:00 on ice
steps.instruction: Cool for 00:01:00 on ice.

steps.title: Mix again by vortexing at maximum speed for 00:00:45
steps.instruction: Mix again by vortexing at maximum speed for 00:00:45 .

steps.title: Heat the tube at 70 °C for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Heat the tube at 70 °C for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Transfer 400 µL of the upper...
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 µL of the upper aqueous phase to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 400 µL of Ph-Cl-IA solution
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of Ph-Cl-IA solution.

steps.title: Shake the tube by inversion for 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Shake the tube by inversion for 00:00:30 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Transfer 300 µL of the upper...
steps.instruction: Transfer 300 µL of the upper aqueous phase to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 300 µL of Ph-Cl-IA solution
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of Ph-Cl-IA solution.

steps.title: Shake the tube by inversion for 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Shake the tube by inversion for 00:00:30 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Transfer 200 µL of the upper...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200 µL of the upper aqueous phase to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of Cl-IA solution
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of Cl-IA solution.

steps.title: Shake the tube by inversion for 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Shake the tube by inversion for 00:00:30 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Transfer aqueous phase to a new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous phase to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 2 volumes of 100 %...
steps.instruction: Add 2 volumes of 100 % volume Ethanol (typically 300-400 µL ).

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 volume of 3 Molarity (M) sodium acetate (typically 15-20 µL ).

steps.title: Mix by inversion
steps.instruction: Mix by inversion.

steps.title: Incubate at -20 °C for 03:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at -20 °C for 03:00:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:20:00 at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:20:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 450 µL of cold 80 % volume ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 450 µL of cold 80 % volume ethanol.

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:05:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of cold 80 % volume ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of cold 80 % volume ethanol.

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:05:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in ultra pure...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in ultra pure water (typically 20-100 µL ).

steps.title: Measure the DNA concentration using the NanoDrop
steps.instruction: Measure the DNA concentration using the NanoDrop.

steps.title: Store at -20 °C for short...
steps.instruction: Store at -20 °C for short storage or at -80 °C for long storage.

steps.title: This protocol was developed to extract...
steps.instruction: This protocol was developed to extract both RNA and DNA in parallel (See RNA extraction from colonial tunicates , steps 1-7) using the same samples. However it could be run directly on fresh samples (steps 1.1-1.4).

steps.title: Clean the slide from which you...
steps.instruction: Clean the slide from which you will take the colony of your interest. See Cleaning colonial ascidians .

steps.title: Isolate a cleaned colony composed of approx
steps.instruction: Isolate a cleaned colony composed of approx. 20 zooids.

steps.title: Transfer to a tube and spin...
steps.instruction: Transfer to a tube and spin at maximum speed for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Remove the excess water
steps.instruction: Remove the excess water.

steps.title: If working with fresh samples, add glass beads 0
steps.instruction: If working with fresh samples, add glass beads 0.1mm to the tube and shake on eppendorf thermal shaker at 900rpm.

steps.title: If working with fresh samples, shake...
steps.instruction: If working with fresh samples, shake the tubes on eppendorf thermal shaker at 900rpm.
